title: Mirror the sub item on one board to an item on another board
excerpt: I have created a Board which has Items and Sub items. From this an automation creates an item or sub item as a separate item on a new board. What I am trying to do is write an automation so that the sub item is mirrored …

posts.author: TWellsSB (Tony Wells)
posts.cookedHtml: I have created a Board which has Items and Sub items. From this an automation creates an item or sub item as a separate item on a new board. What I am trying to do is write an automation so that the sub item is mirrored on the new item on the new board
